name: Barbarian

perks.name: Axe Specialization
perks.description: While using axes or Francisca Axes, gain weapon damage.

perks.name: Berserker
perks.description: Gain 2% physical damage bonus and 0.5% move speed bonus for every 10% of your maximum health missing, up to 20% and 5% respectively.

perks.name: Carnage
perks.description: When you hit 2 or more players with a melee weapon within 1.5 seconds, gain 40% physical damage bonus for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Crush
perks.description: While equipped with a two-handed weapon, gain the ability to destroy unreinforced containers. Also gain 1 impact power on your two-handed weapon attacks, making it easier to break blocks and parries.

perks.name: Executioner
perks.description: While using axes or Francisca Axes, gain 20% headshot damage bonus.

perks.name: Heavy Swing
perks.description: Hitting a target with a two-handed weapon increases the duration of movement speed reduction effects applied to them by 80%.

perks.name: Iron Will
perks.description: Gain 75 magic resistance and ignore knockback effects. The maximum magical damage reduction limit is increased to 7.5%.

perks.name: Morale Boost
perks.description: Recover 25% maximum health after killing a player.

perks.name: Potion Chugger
perks.description: Gain 88% increased potency towards all drinks, while reducing the duration by 5%.

perks.name: Robust
perks.description: Gain 10% max health bonus.

perks.name: Savage
perks.description: While not wearing any chest armor, gain 10% physical damage bonus and 1 impact power.

perks.name: Skull Splitter
perks.description: Targets hit by a headshot are inflicted with Bleed. Bleed: Deals a total of 12 physical damage over 4 seconds.

perks.name: Treacherous Lungs
perks.description: Increases the duration of all shouting abilities by 85%.

perks.name: Two-Hander
perks.description: When attacking with a two-handed weapon, gain 5% physical damage bonus and 10% armor penetration.

flavor: The Barbarian is known for his hardy nature, fiery temper, and ability to endure immense pain. His rage and reckless abandon allow him to lead the charge into battle.

skills.name: Achilles Strike
skills.description: Strike a target, reducing their move speed bonus by 30% for 2 seconds. While debuffed, each time the target moves they receive 1(0.5) physical damage. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Blood Exchange
skills.description: Lose 10% of maximum health, but gain 15% action speed for 8 seconds and heal for 1.5% of damage dealt while active. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Finishing Blow
skills.description: Your next attack deals an additional 5 true physical damage. If the target’s health is 10% or lower after the attack, they are instantly killed. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Grappling Hook
skills.description: Throws a grappling rope at a target up to 4m away, pulling them toward you. Cooldown: 16 seconds

skills.name: Hurl Weapon
skills.description: Throws an axe to deal 15% weapon damage. Can only be used when an axe is equipped as your primary weapon. Cooldown: 8 seconds

skills.name: Rage
skills.description: Gain 10 strength, 7% move speed bonus. While active, lose 5% physical damage reduction for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Reckless Attack
skills.description: Grants an additional 50% armor penetration on your next attack, but reduces your armor rating by 100 while active. The effect is consumed when you hit a target or object with a melee attack. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Savage Roar
skills.description: Frightens all enemies within a 7.5m range radius for 6 seconds reducing their physical damage bonus by 30% and move speed bonus by 2.5%. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: War Cry
skills.description: Gain 20% max health bonus for 10 seconds. This effect applies to yourself and allies within a 7.5m radius. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: War Sacrifice
skills.description: While active, gain all attributes. In exchange, lose 10% of your maximum health over 8 seconds. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Spin rapidly with a two-handed weapon, dealing of weapon damage to all nearby enemies. While spinning, your weapon cannot be interrupted by any impact. Cooldown: 32 seconds

name: Bard

perks.name: Charismatic Performance
perks.description: Upgrades a ‘good’ performance into a ‘perfect’ performance.

perks.name: Dancing Feet
perks.description: While holding an instrument, gain 10 additional move speed.

perks.name: Fermata
perks.description: Music buffs applied to yourself last 1.5 times longer.

perks.name: Jolly Time
perks.description: Drinking ale recovers 5(1.0) health, and grants 5 additional move speed, 5 vigor while drunk.

perks.name: Lore Mastery
perks.description: Grants 30% regular interaction speed and increases your Knowledge by an amount equal to 5% of your Resourcefulness.

perks.name: Melodic Protection
perks.description: While playing music, gain 25% physical damage reduction and 25% magical damage reduction.

perks.name: Rapier Mastery
perks.description: While using a Rapier, gain weapon damage and 5% action speed.

perks.name: Reinforced Instruments
perks.description: When attacking with an instrument, gain 50% physical damage bonus.

perks.name: Story Teller
perks.description: Give all nearby party members around a +5 will and +3 knowledge buff.

perks.name: Superior Dexterity
perks.description: 5% faster switching time when switching between weapons utility items.

perks.name: Wanderer's Luck
perks.description: Gain 100 luck and increases the chance of finding high-quality items when opening treasure chests.

perks.name: War Song
perks.description: A successful performance increases nearby allies' weapon damage by for 6 seconds.

flavor: The Bard is a weaver of moving melodies and fantastic tales. They manage to get out of the stickiest of situations using their uncanny ability to mysteriously control the mood of crowds and creatures.

skills.name: Dissonance
skills.description: Plays an instrument to make an unpleasant noise that silences all enemy targets for 2 seconds. Silence: Disables skills spells performance abilities. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Encore
skills.description: Resets the duration of all active music buffs on nearby party members. Cooldown: 40 seconds

skills.name: Music Memory
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Music Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Party Maker
skills.description: Play an instrument to grant all nearby allies immunity to drunkenness for 15 seconds. While immune, drinking alcohol restores 5 health. Cooldown: 40 seconds

name: Cleric

perks.name: Advanced Healer
perks.description: Gain 5 magical healing.

perks.name: Aura of Awe
perks.description: Reduces the action speed of enemies within m by 7%.

perks.name: Banishing Touch
perks.description: When hitting an undead or demon enemy with a melee or ranged attack, has a 5% chance to stun them for 1 second.

perks.name: Blood Tithe
perks.description: Your magical healing increases by 2 for every 10% of health you lose.

perks.name: Blunt Weapon Mastery
perks.description: While using a blunt weapon, gain 10% physical damage bonus.

perks.name: Brewmaster
perks.description: When you drink alcohol, you no longer exhibit the detrimental drunk effects and gain 10 strength. The duration of the drunk effect is increased by 50%.

perks.name: Divine Echo
perks.description: While in a dungeon, Replaces your Resurrection spell with Miracle. When cast, instantly revives all dead allies at their current location. Miracle cannot be recharged.

perks.name: Faithfulness
perks.description: Gain 15% divine magical damage bonus. When a divine attack is successful, reduce their move speed bonus by 15% for 1 seconds. Does not inflict while on cooldown.

perks.name: Heretics Brand
perks.description: When you deal divine magic damage, reduce the target’s spell casting speed by 30% for 2 seconds and prevent them from entering stealth or invisibility.

perks.name: Holy Aura
perks.description: Gain 15 armor rating and 15 magic resistance. This effects both yourself and allies.

perks.name: Holy Water
perks.description: Drinking any drink removes all removable curses and harmful magic effects, and grants the Bless effect.

perks.name: Kindness
perks.description: Heal yourself for 3% of the spell's total heal amount when healing another target.

perks.name: Over Healing
perks.description: Even if the target's health is at full health, additional healing can be done by 2% of the target's maximum health. ^ degenerates at 2% per second.

perks.name: Pain Offering
perks.description: When you take damage, heal allies within m for 3% of the damage taken.

perks.name: Perseverance
perks.description: Reduces all types of incoming damage by 2.

perks.name: Protection from Evil
perks.description: Reduce the duration of all harmful effects by 30%.

perks.name: Requiem
perks.description: Resurrecting an ally revives them with 5% HP instead of a sliver of life. When reviving an ally at the Altar of Sacrifice, you do not need to sacrifice any of your own health. Using the Resurrection spell also grants 100% spell casting speed.

perks.name: Sacred Flame
perks.description: When a divine attack is successful, apply sacred flame to the target for 2 seconds. When sacred flame reaches 3 stacks, it detonates, dealing 10(1.0) divine magical damage.

perks.name: Stigmata
perks.description: Lose 1 health every 2 seconds, but gain 15% spell casting speed and 5 magical healing.

perks.name: Undead Slaying
perks.description: Gain 20% undead damage bonus against undead monsters.

flavor: The Cleric is a soldier of immense faith. The Cleric uses his sacred bonds to his gods to call forth the protective powers of light and to vanquish the forces of dark.

skills.name: Barefoot Pilgrimage
skills.description: For 12 seconds, you losing all armor rating from equipped gear (retaining only base armor rating). In return, casting speed is increased by 20%, magical healing by 25%, and debuff duration bonus is reduced by 50%. Cooldown: 90 seconds

skills.name: Confession
skills.description: Remove all harmful poison and curse effects from the target and heal 5 per effect removed. Cooldown: 60 seconds

skills.name: Divine Protection
skills.description: Gain 30% physical damage reduction for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 45 seconds

skills.name: Excommunication
skills.description: Excommunicates the target. For 8 seconds, the target’s divine magic resistance is reduced by 25% and they cannot receive magical healing. Cooldown: 45 seconds

skills.name: Holy Purification
skills.description: After channeling for 1.5 seconds, deal 100(1.0) divine magical damage to all undead monsters within a 7.5m radius around you. Cooldown: 45 seconds

skills.name: Judgement
skills.description: After channeling for 1 seconds, deal 25(1.0) divine magical damage to a target and reduce their move speed bonus by 30% for 2 seconds. Once the channel begins on a target, crosshair targeting is no longer required. This spell has a 5m range and will fail if the target goes out of range. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Smite
skills.description: Deal an additional 5(1.0) divine magical damage to all enemies you hit within 12 seconds. Only when melee attacking. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Vow of Silence
skills.description: Unable to cast spells for 6 seconds, but gain a stack of Penance every second.Penance: Increases the effectiveness of magical bonus by 10% and is consumed upon using a divine attack or spell. Cooldown: 32 seconds

name: Druid

perks.name: Animal Kinship
perks.description: Not all animals and insects attack first.

perks.name: Dreamwalk
perks.description: When you take damage, your magical power increases by 5 for 3 seconds and you become spiritual. The player does not collide with other targets and cannot attack or use skills, but can cast spells. This ability triggers once every 12 seconds. Cooldown: 12 seconds

perks.name: Enhanced Wildness
perks.description: While you are in animal form, you gain 5% physical damage bonus and 20 armor rating.

perks.name: Force of Nature
perks.description: When you heal a target, the target gains 5 physical power for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Herbal Sensing
perks.description: Detects nearby herbs and increases the chance of gathering higher-grade herbs.

perks.name: Lifebloom Aura
perks.description: Restores an additional 1 health to target when caster heals self or allies within aura range. Disables shapeshift.

perks.name: Natural Healing
perks.description: Recover yourself and nearby allies 1(0.1) health every 3 seconds.

perks.name: Prophecy
perks.description: Targets near the aiming point are automatically selected, and single-target magic aimed at the selected target will not miss.

perks.name: Shapeshift Mastery
perks.description: Reduces shapeshifting time by 25% and reduces the cooldown of Wild skills by 92.5%, but prevents the use of spirit spells.

perks.name: Spirit Bond
perks.description: Once every 1 second, You will receive 2% of damage received by party members instead. Can receive damage up to 20.

perks.name: Spirit Magic Mastery
perks.description: When you cast spirit magic, you gain 10 magical power.

perks.name: Sun and Moon
perks.description: Nearby allies gain 3 vigor and 5 magical power.

perks.name: Thorn Coat
perks.description: When melee attacked, return 5 true physical damage to the attacker.

flavor: The Druid is a spirit mage with a deep connection to nature. Able to wield the powers of the wilderness, they can even transform their bodies to mimic the powers of beasts.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory II
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

name: Fighter

perks.name: Adrenaline Spike
perks.description: When your health goes below 4%, gain 15% action speed, 3% move speed bonus, and 30% regular interaction speed for 12 seconds, and suffer no penalty from using the Adrenaline Rush skill. Cooldown: 24 seconds

perks.name: Barricade
perks.description: While in defensive stance, gain 75 armor rating and 75 magic resistance.

perks.name: Combo Attack
perks.description: When you successfully land consecutive melee attacks within 2 seconds, gain 10% physical damage bonus per stack, up to 2 stacks.

perks.name: Counterattack
perks.description: When you successfully block an attack, gain 10% move speed bonus and 10% action speed for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Defense Mastery
perks.description: Gain an additional 15% armor rating bonus from equipped armor. The maximum physical damage reduction limit is Increased to 7.5%.

perks.name: Dual Wield
perks.description: While you have weapons equipped in both hands, gain 10% action speed.

perks.name: Last Bastion
perks.description: When your health falls to 3.3% or below, you gain 150 armor rating, 50 magic resistance and 30% projectile damage reduction for 12 seconds. Cooldown: 32 seconds

perks.name: Projectile Resistance
perks.description: Gain 10% projectile damage reduction. While in defensive stance, gain an additional 10% projectile damage reduction.

perks.name: Shield Mastery
perks.description: While in defensive stance with a shield, gain 10% move speed bonus. When you successfully block an attack, gain 50% action speed and 10% physical damage bonus on your next melee attack within 1 seconds.

perks.name: Slayer
perks.description: While holding a weapon in each hand, gain weapon damage, 10 additional move speed but lose the ability to equip plate armor.

perks.name: Survivalist Tongue
perks.description: All consumables have a {0}% effect increase.

perks.name: Swift
perks.description: Reduces the armor move speed penalty by 20%. Only applies to armor-related penalties.

perks.name: Sword Mastery
perks.description: When using a sword-type weapon, gain weapon damage and 5% action speed. Also gain 10 additional move speed when taking a defensive stance with your sword.

perks.name: Veteran Instinct
perks.description: When you enter combat, physical damage reduction is increased by 10% of its current value and physical damage bonus is increased by 10% for 4 seconds.

perks.name: Weapon Guard
perks.description: When defending with a weapon, gain 1 impact resistance and if you succeed in defending, you gain 10% physical damage bonus and 5% action speed for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Weapon Mastery
perks.description: Gain the ability to use any weapon.

flavor: The Fighter is a jack of all trades when it comes to combat. Well-versed with a multitude of weapons and armaments, the Fighter can hold his own against anyone.

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.description: Gain 15% action speed, 5% move speed bonus for 8 seconds. After the duration ends, lose 8% action speed and 4% move speed bonus for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Breakthrough
skills.description: Removes debuffs that slow move speed, grants a 7 additional move speed, and ignores all move speed debuff effects for 8 seconds. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Disarm
skills.description: If you block a melee attack with your weapon within 8 seconds, you disarm the attacker for 1 seconds. Disarmed targets cannot use weapons. This effect can only be applied once and is consumed when you block a melee attack. Can only be used while a weapon is equipped. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Fortified Ground
skills.description: Deploys a rallying banner for 45 seconds. Allies within 33m of the banner have all attributes increased by 3. Cooldown: 12 seconds

skills.name: Perfect Block
skills.description: Gain 5 impact resistance for 12 seconds. Cooldown: 8 seconds

skills.name: Pommel Strike
skills.description: When attacking with the hilt while a one-handed weapon is equipped as your main weapon, it deals an additional 15(1.0) physical damage and silences the target. If the silence interrupts the enemy’s action, it deals an additional 10(1.0) physical damage and reduces move speed bonus by 50% for 2 seconds. Silence: Disables skills spells performance abilities. Cooldown: 12 seconds

skills.name: Second Wind
skills.description: Recover 40% maximum health over 12 seconds. Additionally, Second Wind removes the negative effects of Adrenaline Rush. Recharge: Campfire

skills.name: Shield Slam
skills.description: Inflicts 30(1.0) physical damage on the target, and reduces the targets move speed bonus by 20% for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 8 seconds

skills.name: Spell Reflection
skills.description: While blocking, gain the ability to reflect spells. This buff persists until triggered, lasting 5 seconds. Before activation, gain 15% magical damage reduction. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Sprint
skills.description: Gain 3 stacks of Momentum, granting 10 additional move speed per stack. Lose 1 stack every 2 seconds. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Taunt
skills.description: Increases the aggro value to all monsters within a 7.5m area by 200%. Gain 12% physical damage reduction and 12% magical damage reduction for 8 seconds Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Victory Strike
skills.description: Your next attack deals an additional 40% physical damage bonus. If this attack kills a player, the skill triggers again with no cooldown. Cooldown: 24 seconds

name: Ranger

perks.name: Camping Mastery
perks.description: Instantly place a campfire and increase its duration by 100%.

perks.name: Chase
perks.description: Detect recent enemy footsteps and can hear enemy footstep sounds from farther away.

perks.name: Crippling Shot
perks.description: Hitting the target’s leg reduces their move speed bonus by 40% for 1 seconds.

perks.name: Crossbow Mastery
perks.description: While using a crossbow, gain 5% physical damage bonus and an additional 50% action speed while reloading.

perks.name: Feral Resonance
perks.description: When an allied animal is within a radius of meters, both you and the animal gain a 10% increase to maximum health bonus and a increase to physical damage bonus.

perks.name: First Aid
perks.description: Increases the use speed of Bandages and Surgical Kits by 0.15%, and allows them to be used on allies.

perks.name: Kinesthesia
perks.description: When moving with the bowstring drawn, move speed bonus increases by 88.5%.

perks.name: Longshot Expert
perks.description: Deals additional damage as the distance to the target increases, up to 10 physical damage.

perks.name: Nimble Hands
perks.description: When using a bow, increases your draw speed by 15%.

perks.name: Overload
perks.description: Increases the maximum loadable ammo of your currently bow-type equipped weapon by 50%.

perks.name: Point-Blank Expert
perks.description: Deals an additional 3 true physical damage to targets within 6m.

perks.name: Quick Reload
perks.description: When reloading a bow-type or firearm-type weapon, gain 50% action speed.

perks.name: Ranged Weapons Mastery
perks.description: When attacking with a ranged weapon, gain 5% physical damage bonus.

perks.name: Sharpshooter
perks.description: When attacking with a ranged weapon, gain 15% headshot damage bonus.

perks.name: Spear Proficiency
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip spears. While using a spear, gain 5 move speed.

perks.name: Trap Mastery
perks.description: Instantly place trap items and recover them when disarmed.

perks.name: Windfletch
perks.description: Increases projectile speed of arrows and bolts by 1.5%.

flavor: The Ranger is an excellent survivalist. With a keen eye and quick hands, the Ranger tracks his enemies, sets traps and ambushes unsuspecting prey.

skills.name: Backstep
skills.description: Quickly retreats a short distance. It can also be used in the air. Cooldown: 12 seconds

skills.name: Explosive Shot
skills.description: For 12 seconds, attacks made with bows or crossbows cause fired projectiles to explode after 3 seconds, dealing 10(1.0) fire magical damage to nearby enemies and applying Burn for 1 second. Burn: The target takes 3(0.5) fire magical damage. Cooldown: 22 seconds

skills.name: Field Ration
skills.description:
Forage food and recover 40(1.0) health. Cooldown: 24 seconds
Recharge: Campfire

skills.name: Forceful Shot
skills.description: When using a bow-type weapon, gain the ability to knock targets back for 10 seconds. Cooldown: 20 seconds

skills.name: Multishot
skills.description: Fire 5 arrows at once in a cone shaped dispersion. Cooldown: 22 seconds

skills.name: Overdraw
skills.description: When using bow-type weapons, maintaining a fully drawn bow increases weapon damage by 25% every 1 seconds for 12 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. Cooldown: 22 seconds

skills.name: Penetrating Shot
skills.description: Gain 50% headshot penetration and 25% armor penetration for 8 seconds. Bow and crossbow attacks pierce targets. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Purge Shot
skills.description: For 10 seconds, removes all magical buffs from the target. Each successful ranged weapon hit deals 10(1.0) magical damage magical damage per buff removed. Cooldown: 32 seconds

skills.name: Quick Fire
skills.description: Gain an additional 50% action speed for 8 seconds while using bow-type weapons. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Quickshot
skills.description: Fire arrows in a quick succession. Each bow-type will fire a different amount of arrows. Cooldown: 22 seconds

skills.name: Taming Shot
skills.description: Hit an animal to tame it and have it assist the Ranger. Already tamed animals cannot be tamed again.

skills.name: True Shot
skills.description: Projectile flight speed is greatly increased, also increasing physical damage bonus by 8% for 8 seconds. Cooldown: 18 seconds

name: Rogue

perks.name: Ambush
perks.description: When coming out of hide, you gain an additional 10% move speed bonus for 3 seconds. If the melee attack is successful, the effect disappears.

perks.name: Back Attack
perks.description: When attacking a target from behind, gain 30% backstab power.

perks.name: Creep
perks.description: While crouch walking, reduce the volume of footsteps significantly and gain 10% move speed bonus. While crouched, reduce monster detection radius by 5%.

perks.name: Dagger Mastery
perks.description: While using a dagger or throwing knives, gain 15% physical damage bonus and 1 true physical damage.

perks.name: Double Jump
perks.description: You gain the ability to jump an additional time in the air.

perks.name: Hand Crossbow Mastery
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip the Hand Crossbow, while using it gain + weapon damage.

perks.name: Hide Mastery
perks.description: Increases the duration of the hide skill by 1.5 times and reduces its cooldown time by 93%.

perks.name: Jokester
perks.description: Give all party members all attributes.

perks.name: Lethal Mark
perks.description: A target hit by a throwing knife loses 30% physical damage reduction for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack on the same target.

perks.name: Pickpocket
perks.description: Steal items from nearby enemies. Additionally, your hide will not be revealed when you are bumped into. Items worn in utility slots do not appear on the waist.

perks.name: Poisoned Weapon
perks.description: A successful attack applies poison that deals 4(0.5) magical damage and reduces their incoming physical healing by 10% and incoming magical healing by 10% over 4 seconds. The poison can stack up to 5 times.

perks.name: Stealth
perks.description: While hiding, gain the ability to move 10 steps while crouching or slow walking. Also gain 3 additional move speed per remaining step.

perks.name: Thrust
perks.description: While using dagger, gain an additional 15% armor penetration.

perks.name: Traps and Locks
perks.description: You can unlock locked locks without a lockpick and detect traps within a certain range to disarm them.

perks.name: Trickster
perks.description: While using throwing weapons, gain 30% action speed and 10% move speed bonus. Increased 50% item equip speed.

perks.name: Veil of Shadows
perks.description: When health falls below 3%, you immediately enter stealth for 6 seconds and gain a 10% move speed bonus. Cooldown: 48 seconds

perks.name: Wall Ride
perks.description: Allows you to climb along walls for up to 10 steps and perform an additional jump by kicking off a wall. You will automatically fall after hanging on a wall for 16 seconds.

flavor: The Rogue is a master of deception able to silently slip between the shadows to work his dastardly deeds. His dexterous hands enable him to quickly loot riches, pick locks, and disable various traps.

skills.name: Caltrops
skills.description: Drops Caltrops at your feet that deal 10(1.0) physical damage and slows the move speed bonus by 50% of anything that steps on them for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Cut Throat
skills.description: When you successfully hit a target, silence them for 2 seconds, disabling the targets skills spells performance abilities. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Dual Strike
skills.description: Strike simultaneously with both daggers, delivering a powerful blow that combines the damage of both weapons. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Hide
skills.description: Become invisible for 8 seconds. It is possible to change your equipment in this state. You are revealed when you attempt an action, such as moving, attacking, or using a skill. After being revealed, you suffer a 30% physical damage bonus penalty for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 32 seconds

skills.name: Play Dead
skills.description: Play dead and lie down like a corpse. Cooldown: 6 seconds

skills.name: Rupture
skills.description: The next successful attack causes the target to bleed for 15(0.75) physical damage over 5 seconds. The buff is consumed when an attack hits an object or target. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Shadowstep
skills.description: While using a dagger or throwing knives, your next attack instantly moves you behind the target on hit within 12 seconds. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Smoke Pot
skills.description: A smoke pot is deployed creating a smoke screen. The smoke screen lasts 8 seconds and covers a 6m area.When an enemy target enters the smoke screen, reduces their move speed bonus by 5%. Cooldown: 60 seconds

skills.name: Sneak Attack
skills.description: Your next melee attack deals an additional 15 physical damage. If the target is not in combat, it deals an additional 10 physical damage. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Tumbling
skills.description: When used, backtumbles in the opposite direction the player is facing. Cooldown: 0.5 seconds

skills.name: Weakpoint Attack
skills.description: When you successfully hit a target, reduce their armor rating bonus by 30% for 3 seconds. Only when melee attacking. Cooldown: 24 seconds

name: Sorcerer

perks.name: Air Mastery
perks.description: Gain 15% air magic knockback power bonus and 50% air magical damage bonus.

perks.name: Apex of Sorcery
perks.description: While casting spells, reduce movement speed by 99.9%, but gain 50% magical damage bonus and 50% spell casting speed, 25% action speed.

perks.name: Elemental Fury
perks.description: For every 1% of health lost, gain a 0.5% cooldown reduction bonus and 0.25% magical damage bonus.

perks.name: Innate Talent
perks.description: Grants 5 additional memory capacity. when using magic with bare hands, gain 5 magical power and 10% spell casting speed.

perks.name: Lightning Mastery
perks.description: Gain 25% lightning magical damage bonus. Once every 2 seconds while dealing lightning magical damage, inflict electric shock for 1 seconds, transferring 5 lightning magical damage to the closest target within m of the primary target.

perks.name: Mana Flow
perks.description: Each successful spell cast within 4 seconds increases your magical damage bonus by 5% and magic penetration by 5%. This effect stacks up to 3 times, and all stacks are removed if the timing window expires.

perks.name: Mana Fold
perks.description: Reduce all spell cooldowns by 92.5%, but lose 15% spell casting speed.

perks.name: Merged Might
perks.description: When casting a merge spell, gain 5 magical power. After casting, gain a 5% move speed bonus for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Spell Sculpting
perks.description: Increases the range of all spells by 12.5% and the area of ​​effect by 12.5%, but increases the cooldown time by 87.5%.

perks.name: Spell Stride
perks.description: Gain 30% move speed bonus while casting two spells simultaneously.

perks.name: Time Distortion
perks.description: Reduces cast time of all spells by 5%, but increases cooldown time for all spells by 20%.

flavor: The Sorcerer is a master of the elements and can weave together multiple spells to devastating results. With an innate aptitude for magic, they can cast spells using their bare hands.

skills.name: Sorcery I
skills.description: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.

skills.name: Sorcery II
skills.description: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.

name: Warlock

perks.name: Antimagic
perks.description: Gain 20% magical damage reduction except against divine magic.

perks.name: Curse Mastery
perks.description: Gain 30% duration towards all curses you cast.

perks.name: Dark Enhancement
perks.description: Gain 20% dark magical damage bonus towards dark magic spells.

perks.name: Dark Reflection
perks.description: While active, reflect 15(0.25) dark magical damage to the melee attacker. Does not reflect while on cooldown. Cooldown: 15 seconds

perks.name: Demon Armor
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip plate armor, but lose 10% spell casting speed.

perks.name: Immortal Lament
perks.description: Casting spells will no longer take you below 1 health. When your health falls below 5%, gain 100% increased magical healing bonus for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds

perks.name: Infernal Pledge
perks.description: Reduces damage taken from Undead and Demons by 10%, and increases damage dealt to Undead and Demons by 15%.

perks.name: Malice
perks.description: Gain 15% will bonus.

perks.name: Shadow Touch
perks.description: Dealing physical damage to an enemy with a melee weapon deals 2 true dark magical damage and heals you for 2 health.

perks.name: Soul Collector
perks.description: When you deal the final blow to an enemy, one darkness shard is collected. Gain all attributes, 33% dark magical damage bonus for each shard collected, up to a maximum of 3 shards. When you deal dark magic damage, consume all collected shards.

perks.name: Torture Mastery
perks.description: All curses inflicted upon enemies restores 2(0.15) recoverable health to the caster with each instance of damage dealt. All Warlock spell costs are doubled when this perk is equipped.

perks.name: Vampirism
perks.description: Gain 20% magical healing bonus.

flavor: The Warlock is a brooding manipulator of dark magic. They sacrifice their life force to call upon unknown forces of pain and evil. A worthy adversary proficient in both magic and weapons.

skills.name: Blood Pact
skills.description: Take the form of your contracted demon, gaining an additional 30 max health, 50 armor rating, and 50 magic resistance. Your entire body is covered in Abyssal Flame, taking 1% damage per second and dealing 2(0.25) magical damage per second to nearby characters. Once activated, the effect cannot be stopped until the contract is complete. Additionally, by consuming Darkness Shards, you gain all attributes, 25% dark magical damage bonus for each Darkness Shard consumed. When you become a demon your skills change to demon-only skills. Left-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then performs bare-handed attack. Perform up to 4 combo attacks using both hands. Right-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then fires a bolt of darkness.

skills.name: Blow of Corruption
skills.description: Your next physical attack deals 12(1.0) evil magical damage to the target and reduces their incoming physical healing by 80% and incoming magical healing by 80% for 12 seconds. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Dark Offering
skills.description: Channel your mind, sacrificing 10% of your max health per second to gain 5% magical damage bonus and 5% physical damage bonus. This bonus lasts for 60 seconds. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Phantomize
skills.description: Phase through melee attacks and projectiles for 4 seconds. While active, gain 5% move speed bonus and lose 50% magical damage reduction. During this period you can only move and do not collide with other players or monsters. Cooldown: 28 seconds

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

name: Wizard

perks.name: Arcane Feedback
perks.description: When you deal damage with an arcane spell, gain a stacking bonus granting 3% spell casting speed and 3% arcane magical damage bonus per stack for 7 seconds. This skill can stack up to 5 times and the duration resets with each successful stack.

perks.name: Arcane Mastery
perks.description: Gain 5% arcane magical damage bonus and reduce the cast time of arcane spells by 0.5 seconds.

perks.name: Arcane Precision
perks.description: Deal 88.5% increased magical damage to crowd-controlled targets.

perks.name: Cold Focus
perks.description: Magical damage dealt to targets affected by frostbite is increased by 88.5%.

perks.name: Fire Mastery
perks.description: Gain 5% fire magical damage bonus. The duration of applied burns are increased by 2 seconds, and a burned target reduces incoming physical healing by 50% and incoming magical healing by 50% for 4 seconds.

perks.name: Focused Mind
perks.description: While channeling, physical damage reduction is increased by 15% and magical damage reduction is increased by 15%. If the channeling is not interrupted, magical damage bonus increases by 5% every 0.5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. This effect lasts for 8 seconds.

perks.name: Glass Cannon
perks.description: Reduces maximum health by 10% but grants a 20 magical power.

perks.name: Ice Mastery
perks.description: Dealing damage with ice magic freezes the target's feet and prevents them from moving for 0.5 seconds.

perks.name: Ice Shield
perks.description: Gain 20 armor rating. Inflict frostbite for 0.5 seconds on melee attacker. Does not inflict while on cooldown. Frostbite: The target loses 20% move speed bonus and 20% action speed. Cooldown: 5 seconds

perks.name: Lingering Magic
perks.description: The duration of beneficial spell effects is increased by 88%.

perks.name: Mana Surge
perks.description: Gain 10% magical damage bonus.

perks.name: Melt
perks.description: When you deal magical fire damage to a target, the target loses 15% physical damage reduction and 5% projectile damage reduction for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Quick Chant
perks.description: Gain 15% spell casting speed.

perks.name: Reactive Shield
perks.description: When you take damage, gain an arcane shield that lasts for 3 seconds. The shield can absorb 15 total damage and will only reactivate after a cooldown period. Cooldown: 12 seconds

perks.name: Sage
perks.description: Gain 15% knowledge bonus.

perks.name: Spell Overload
perks.description: Reduces knowledge bonus by 20% and increases all spells counts by 60%.

perks.name: Staff Mastery
perks.description: When using a staff-type weapon, you gain magic weapon damage.

perks.name: Static Charge
perks.description: Each lightning spell hit increases the damage of your next lightning spell by 10% lightning magical damage bonus, stacking up to 3 times.

flavor: The Wizard calls forth the immense powers of magic to suit his needs. Whether that means summoning a powerful fireball to cast asunder his foes or to temporarily vanishing into thin air, his incantations are a sight to behold.

skills.name: Arcane Infusion
skills.description: For 6 seconds, your melee attacks deal an additional 7(0.5) arcane magical damage to enemies within a 1.75m radius around the target. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Arcane Insight
skills.description: For 8 seconds, memory capacity is increased by 50%, and you can move while channeling. Cooldown: 8 seconds

skills.name: Arcane Shield
skills.description: Gain a shield around you that absorbs 15 damage from all damage sources for 12 seconds. When the maximum amount of absorb has been reached, the shield unleashes an Arcane Explosion, dealing 5(1.0) magical damage to enemy targets in a 2m radius around you. Cooldown: 25 seconds

skills.name: Arcane Surge
skills.description: Increases spell casting speed by 30% for 12 seconds. Cooldown: 24 seconds

skills.name: Intense Focus
skills.description: Reduce the cast time of your next spell to 0.1 seconds. Cooldown: 18 seconds

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Enter a meditative state and recover spells at a rate of 34 spells costs over 24 seconds. Cooldown: 45 seconds

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.
